calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-23-2011 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (155 Eureka Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Aug-19-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Alkazin for Janice Alvers.

The sale of the property located at 155 Eureka Street in San Francisco was confirmed at $1,151,000.00 subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the petition. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (215 Corbett Avenue, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Aug-19-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Alkazin for Janice Alvers.

The sale of the property located at 215 Corbett Avenue in San Francisco was confirmed at $1,000,000.00 subject to the terms and conditions as set forth in the petition. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-25-2010 Granted Per Written Order
